PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?cityLabel
WHERE {
  ?record wdt:P1260 wd:Q27156 ;
          wdt:P2781 ?time ;
          wdt:P585 "2001-12-14"^^xsd:date ;
          wdt:P2873 ?venue .
  ?time wikibase:quantityValue ?timeValue .
  FILTER (xsd:float(?timeValue) = 50.26)
  ?venue wdt:P131 ?city .
  ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q515 .
  ?city wdt:P1082 ?cityPop .
  ?otherCity wdt:P17 wd:Q31 ;
             wdt:P31 wd:Q515 ;
             wdt:P1082 ?otherPop ;
             rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
  ?cityPop wikibase:quantityValue ?cityPopulation .
  ?otherPop wikibase:quantityValue ?otherPopulation .
  FILTER (?otherPopulation > ?cityPopulation)
  FILTER (LANG(?cityLabel) = 'en')
  ORDER BY DESC(?otherPopulation)
  LIMIT 1

args.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?cityLabel
WHERE {
  ?record wdt:P1260 wd:Q27156 ;
          wdt:P2781 ?time ;
          wdt:P585 "2001-12-14"^^xsd:date ;
          wdt:P2873 ?venue .
  ?time wikibase:quantityValue ?timeValue .
  FILTER (xsd:float(?timeValue) = 50.26)
  ?venue wdt:P131 ?city .
  ?city wdt:P31 wd:Q515 .
  ?city wdt:P1082 ?cityPop .
  ?otherCity wdt:P17 wd:Q31 ;
             wdt:P31 wd:Q515 ;
             wdt:P1082 ?otherPop ;
             rdfs:label ?cityLabel .
  ?cityPop wikibase:quantityValue ?cityPopulation .
  ?otherPop wikibase:quantityValue ?otherPopulation .
  FILTER (?otherPopulation > ?cityPopulation)
  FILTER (LANG(?cityLabel) = 'en')
  ORDER BY DESC(?otherPopulation)
  LIMIT 1
